content:
Maintenance from December 12th 08:00-11:00 (UTC+8)
Maintenance Compensation: Silver Core×200, Pure Core×5

**【Update Content】**

2. **New Activity**
【**Thais Rerun**】
● The event will be available from December 16th 9:00 - January 13th 9:00, also with banners, gift boxs on sale and her own event with limited event sr wheel.
● During event, “Procreation Frenzy” will be unlocked after finishing main story 2-9(Normal).
● The “Reality Starting Point” costs to unlock “Procreation Frenzy” stories only need one now and won’t require Affinity levels.
● The Affinity you get in any ways will be doubled during event.

2. **General Updates**
● Updated some system effect diagrams in the "Tutorial" to make text and image descriptions more accurate.
● Optimized the layout of the "Investigation Data" interface, now defaulting to preview the "Creator" information at the bottom, facilitating Keepers' team composition overview.
● Optimized movement speed in "Exploration", appropriately accelerating the pace.
● Simplified exploration process by removing event option pop-ups when reaching "Secret Passage Exit".
● Skipping story will no longer skip in-battle narrative.
